CVE-2018-25033.title: ADMesh through 0.98.4 has a heap-based buffer over-read in stl_up ...
CVE-2018-25033.summary: ADMesh through 0.98.4 has a heap-based buffer over-read in stl_update_connects_remove_1 (called from stl_remove_degenerate) in connect.c in libadmesh.a.

CVE-2022-38072.title: An improper array index validation vulnerability exists in the st ...
CVE-2022-38072.summary: An improper array index validation vulnerability exists in the stl_fix_normal_directions functionality of ADMesh Master Commit 767a105 and v0.98.4. A specially-crafted stl file can lead to a heap buffer overflow. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.
